purpose: Explain mapping namespace relationships and guide MCP toward legal local mapping acquisition.

rules.use: Bridge obfuscated runtime or official names into a stable Fabric-compatible namespace.
Resolve human-readable names for source navigation and stacktrace explanation.
Treat Yarn as the public named mapping family. Full mapping tables should be downloaded or generated locally when the user needs them.

distributionPolicy.reason: Generated mapping tables and remapped source packages should be acquired by MCP on demand and cached locally according to their upstream licenses.
